fullName:
com.blockether.spel.snapshot-test.Integration tests for [clickable] annotation noise reduction.

   Tests that cursor:pointer inherited from interactive ancestors
   does NOT mark child elements as [clickable]..inherited cursor:pointer from button.child span inside button does NOT get separate [clickable]
name:
Integration tests for [clickable] annotation noise reduction.

   Tests that cursor:pointer inherited from interactive ancestors
   does NOT mark child elements as [clickable]. > inherited cursor:pointer from button > child span inside button does NOT get separate [clickable]
